Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put {Cards:plural:a card|{:diff()} cards} from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

REBALANCEDSPIRE-WISH.description: Put a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
